samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>A pipelined unsigned 8-bit multiplier.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable signal controlling the multiplication process.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplicand input.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplier input.</input>
        <output id="mul_en_out">Output enable signal indicating when the multiplication result is valid.</output>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">Product output.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Implements a pipelined unsigned 8-bit multiplier using a combination of input control, input registers, partial product generation, partial sum calculation, final product calculation, and output assignment stages.</implementation>
    <task id="assign_output">
        <description>Assigns the output based on the output enable signal and the product register value.</description>
        <implementation>if (mul_en_out) begin
            mul_out = mul_out_reg;
        end else begin
            mul_out = 0;
        end</implementation>
    </task>
    
    <parameter_description>
        <constant name="WIDTH_A" type="numeric" value="8"/> <!-- Width of the multiplicand -->
        <constant name="WIDTH_B" type="numeric" value="8"/> <!-- Width of the multiplier -->
        <constant name="WIDTH_OUT" type="numeric" value="16"/> <!-- Width of the product output -->
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="mul_en_out_reg" width_description="[1:0]">Register to hold the output enable signal.</reg>
        
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            if (~rst_n) begin
                mul_en_out_reg <= 0;
            end else begin
                mul_en_out_reg[1] <= mul_en_out_reg[0];
                mul_en_out_reg[0] <= mul_en_in;
            end
        end
        
        <assign id="mul_en_out" value="{mul_en_out_reg[1]}"/>
        
        <reg id="mul_a_reg" width_description="[WIDTH_A-1:0]">Register to hold the multiplicand.</reg>
        <reg id="mul_b_reg" width_description="[WIDTH_B-1:0]">Register to hold the multiplier.</reg>
        
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            if (~rst_n) begin
                mul_a_reg <= 0;
                mul_b_reg <= 0;
            end else begin
                mul_a_reg <= mul_a;
                mul_b_reg <= mul_b;
            end
        end
        
        <wire id="temp[0]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Wire to hold the first partial product.</wire>
        <wire id="temp[1]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Wire to hold the second partial product.</wire>
        <wire id="temp[2]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Wire to hold the third partial product.</wire>
        <wire id="temp[3]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Wire to hold the fourth partial product.</wire>
        <wire id="temp[4]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Wire to hold the fifth partial product.</wire>
        <wire id="temp[5]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Wire to hold the sixth partial product.</wire>
        <wire id="temp[6]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Wire to hold the seventh partial product.</wire>
        <wire id="temp[7]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Wire to hold the eighth partial product.</wire>
        
        <assign id="temp[0]" value="{9'd0,mul_a_reg[0]&mul_b_reg}"/>
        <assign id="temp[1]" value="{8'd0,mul_a_reg[1]&mul_b_reg,1'd0}"/>
        <assign id="temp[2]" value="{7'd0,mul_a_reg[2]&mul_b_reg,2'd0}"/>
        <assign id="temp[3]" value="{6'd0,mul_a_reg[3]&mul_b_reg,3'd0}"/>
        <assign id="temp[4]" value="{5'd0,mul_a_reg[4]&mul_b_reg,4'd0}"/>
        <assign id="temp[5]" value="{4'd0,mul_a_reg[5]&mul_b_reg,5'd0}"/>
        <assign id="temp[6]" value="{3'd0,mul_a_reg[6]&mul_b_reg,6'd0}"/>
        <assign id="temp[7]" value="{2'd0,mul_a_reg[7]&mul_b_reg,7'd0}"/>
        
        <reg id="sum[0]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Register to hold the first partial sum.</reg>
        <reg id="sum[1]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Register to hold the second partial sum.</reg>
        <reg id="sum[2]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Register to hold the third partial sum.</reg>
        <reg id="sum[3]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Register to hold the fourth partial sum.</reg>
        <reg id="sum[4]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Register to hold the fifth partial sum.</reg>
        <reg id="sum[5]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Register to hold the sixth partial sum.</reg>
        <reg id="sum[6]" width_description="[WIDTH_A+WIDTH_B-1:0]">Register to hold the seventh partial sum.</reg>
        
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            if (~rst_n) begin
                sum[0] <= 0;
                sum[1] <= 0;
                sum[2] <= 0;
                sum[3] <= 0;
                sum[4] <= 0;
                sum[5] <= 0;
                sum[6] <= 0;
            end else begin
                sum[0] <= temp[0];
                sum[1] <= temp[1] + temp[2];
                sum[2] <= temp[3] + temp[4];
                sum[3] <= temp[5] + temp[6];
                sum[4] <= temp[7];
            end
        end
        
        <reg id="mul_out_reg" width_description="[WIDTH_OUT-1:0]">Register to hold the final product output.</reg>
        
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            if (~rst_n) begin
                mul_out_reg <= 0;
            end else begin
                mul_out_reg <= sum[0] + sum[1] + sum[2] + sum[3] + sum[4];
            end
        end
        
        <assign id="mul_out" value="mul_out_reg"/>
    </logic_description>
endmodule
